title: Validate corelib api.json library tree before publish

source.subject: ci: validate api.json library tree before corelib publish

body:
## Outcome

Validate api.json library tree before corelib publish.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Corelib workspace publish hardening** (`v02-corelib-workspace-publish`).
- Structured **api.json** is the hierarchical contract for package docs (types, members, **typeRef** links)—not parallel string-key tables outside the schema.
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`361e370`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/361e370) — ci: validate api.json library tree before corelib publish
